meaning: v.发出卡嗒卡嗒声,喋喋不休,急忙地做n.吓吱声,喋喋不休的人
examples: There was a rattle of rifle fire.
They've seen it all, so it takes a lot to rattle them.
She slams the kitchen door so hard I hear dishes rattle.
The set ended with Bill Haley's Rock Around the Clock and Shake, Rattle, and Roll.
Mr. POPPLEWELL: A lot of them won't rattle until you actually get them really riled up.
